data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Role-based compensation rules', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of these rules. The linked use case outlines the need for role-based compensation, yet there is no evidence that this requirement has been satisfied or verified. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided, as it fails to confirm the existence or functionality of role-based compensation rules.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of role-based compensation rules.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add checks for role-based compensation rules
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the compensation rules are applied correctly based on roles.
